title: juncus acutus subsp. acutus
intro: Juncus acutus subsp. acutus, also known as the sharp rush or Mediterranean rush, is a perennial plant species in the Juncaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Juncus acutus subsp. acutus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, or dried and made into a powder for use in herbal remedies.
